name: bonk-skin
description: Encode, decode, validate, and render bonk.io skins
author: Pixelmelt

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format cjs --external pixi.js --external @napi-rs/canvas && mv dist/index.js dist/index.cjs && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format esm --external pixi.js --external @napi-rs/canvas && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
